content.text:
<user_query>
Explore the shared infrastructure of a React/TypeScript application:

1. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/ui - UI component library
2. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/state - state management hooks  
3. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/service - API services layer
4. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/domain - domain types/entities
5. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/utils - utilities
6. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/i18n - internationalization
7. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/components - shared page components

For each area:
1. List directory structure - get an idea of the breadth
2. Identify what major reusable components exist (modals, tables, forms, charts, editors, file upload, rich text, signature, image cropping, etc.)
3. Note major reusable infrastructure (API client, auth, error handling, routing, theming, error boundary, internationalization, query state)
4. Look for things like: rich text editors (TipTap/Quill), drag-drop, virtualized lists, chart libraries, file upload, signature pads, code editors

Approximate the lines of code or number of components in each. This will help estimate the foundational/infrastructure work.

Return a comprehensive summary with key component categories.
</user_query>

Exploring the listed directories for structure, components, and dependencies.

[REDACTED]

input.command: wc -l /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/ui/**/*.{tsx,ts} 2>/dev/null | tail -1; wc -l /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/state/**/*.{tsx,ts} 2>/dev/null | tail -1; wc -l /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/service/**/*.{tsx,ts} 2>/dev/null | tail -1; wc -l /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/domain/**/*.{tsx,ts} 2>/dev/null | tail -1; wc -l /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/utils/**/*.{tsx,ts} 2>/dev/null | tail -1; wc -l /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/components/**/*.{tsx,ts} 2>/dev/null | tail -1
input.description: Count total lines of TS/TSX per directory tree

input.command: for d in ui state service domain utils pages/components i18n; do echo "=== $d ==="; find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/$d" -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' \) ! -path '*/node_modules/*' | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | tail -1; done; echo '=== i18n json ==='; find /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/i18n -type f -name '*.json' | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | tail -1
input.description: LOC per src subtree using find+xargs wc

input.command: for d in ui state service domain utils pages/components; do n=$(find "/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/$d" -type f \( -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' \) | wc -l); echo "$d TS/TSX files: $n"; done

input.description: Total LOC in src/service TS files only
Total LOC under src/ui (may fail ARG_MAX)
Total lines in i18n JSON locale files

content.text:
Here is a structured survey of the shared infrastructure under `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src` based on directory layout, dependency usage, and rough size metrics (`find` file counts plus `wc -l` on TypeScript/JavaScript trees where it succeeded).

---

## 1. `src/ui` — UI library and presentation layer

### Directory breadth (approximate layout)

| Area | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/ui/components/` | Bulk of primitives and composites (`atoms`, `molecules`, `organisms`, `forms`, `formControls`, `Layout`, filters, integrations UI, donor/payment compositions, pages-style blocks, etc.) |
| `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/ui/theme/` | Chakra theme tokens and component styles (`colors.ts`, `breakpoints.ts`, `components/*` for button, form, modal, drawer, table, …) |
| `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/ui/assets/` | Large icon set (~200+ icon/logos SVG-in-React), backgrounds |
| `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/ui/utils/` | UI-adjacent helpers (formatting, filters, disclosures, paths, …) |

**Scale:** about **1,478** `.ts`/`.tsx` files and roughly **66k lines** under `src/ui` (excluding non-TS assets counted only by file globs elsewhere).

### Reusable component categories (high signal)

- **Layout / chrome:** Nav, filters layout, drawers, panels, marquee/template views, collapsible sections, reorderable sections.
- **Feedback / overlays:** Modal stack (`Modal`, `SimpleModal`, `FormModal`), destructive confirmation modal, drawers, Loading, suspense wrapper, badges, tags, progress, toasts (via theme).
- **Data display:** **`Table`** (react-table patterns, draggable headers via `react-beautiful-dnd`, cells, grouping, currency cell, selection), pagination, detail lists, entity details, typography helpers.
- **Forms:** **`Form`** + **`FormSection`**; **~145** `formControls` TSX entries covering inputs, masked inputs, selects, radios, checkboxes, switches, sliders, date/time, Smarty address, employment, payment method compositions (Stripe-adjacent, Plaid, Apple/PayPal/Google Pay), bank/Yodlee flows, credentials, CSS/JSON-ish custom fields, **`FieldArray`**, **`RichTextEditorControl`**, **`FormSignaturePadControl`**, file/image upload controls, **`InfiniteSelectControl`** (virtualized list — see libraries).
- **Rich text:** **`molecules/RichTextEditor`** built on **`react-quill`** / **`quill`** with custom blot registration (`Box.ts`, toolbar, handlers). (TipTap is used heavily in **`src/pages/Builder/.../TextEditor`**, not as the primary `src/ui` RTE.)
- **Code / structured text:** **`molecules/CodeEditor`** (**`@uiw/react-codemirror`**) and **`CodeView`**; custom JSON lint wired to **`@codemirror/lint`** in `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/utils/lint/conditionalJsonLinter.ts`.
- **Files / media:** **`molecules/FileUploader`**, **`DropFileInputControl`** (**`react-dropzone`**), **`SingleImageUploaderControl`**, **`MediaManagerDrawerControl`**, **`FormImageAttributes`** / scale controls, **`VenueEditor`** (**`konva` / `react-konva`** for canvas layout — not a dedicated “crop library”).
- **Signature:** **`SignaturePadControl`** + form wrapper (**`react-signature-canvas`**).
- **Drag-and-drop:** **`molecules/DragDrop`** and table header reordering (**`react-beautiful-dnd`**); **`@dnd-kit`** appears mainly in **`src/pages/Builder`** and related flows rather than exclusively in `ui`.
- **Design system:** **Chakra UI 1.x**, Emotion, **Framer Motion**, **Tailwind** (also `@tailwindcss/typography`, container queries); Storybook coverage across many widgets.

There is **no** dedicated image-crop dependency (e.g. `react-image-crop`) in `package.json`; image workflows lean on uploads, galleries, blurhash, and Konva for venue diagrams.

---

## 2. `src/state` — React Query hooks and app state glue

### Directory breadth

Flat namespaces mirror product domains: e.g. `admin/`, `org/`, `user/`, `public/`, `action_pages/`, `integrations/`, `transactions/`, `exports/`, `featureFlags/`, `authStore/`, plus shared **`utils/`** (pagination, sort/query params, permissions, route↔tab sync, file uploader helper, request toasts).

**Scale:** **682** `.ts`/`.tsx` files, roughly **26k lines**.

### Major infrastructure patterns

- **Server state:** **`react-query` v3** (`useQuery`, `useMutation`, `useInfiniteQuery`) throughout; **`QueryClientProvider`** wired from `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/ap.tsx`.
- **Client auth snapshot:** **`zustand`** in `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/state/authStore/useAuthStore.ts` (consumed by feature flags, user mutations, wrappers).
- **Cross-cutting helpers:** **`usePermissions`** / **`PermissionsRouteGuard`**, **`usePagination`**, **`useQueryParam`/`useSortParam`**, **`useQueryFilters`**, **`useRouteAndTabNavigation`**, **`useRequestToast`**, **`useFileUploader`**.
- **Cache keys / resources:** `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/state/cacheHelper/resourceKeys.ts` (and related usage in the tree).

Routing itself lives at app shell level (**`react-router-dom` v6**, `BrowserRouter` in **`main.tsx`**), not inside `src/state`.

---

## 3. `src/service` — API client and thin HTTP modules

### Directory breadth

Mostly **`/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/service/anedot/`**: **`client.ts`** ( **`ApiClient`** wrapping **`axios`** — namespaces `org | user | admin | public`, CSRF/XSRF, 401 redirect, typed error deserialization), plus small modules (`accounts`, `contacts`, `entries`, `exports`, `funds`, …) with **`fixtures`** / **`mocks`** (**`MSW`**-friendly patterns).

**Scale:** **43** TS files, roughly **1.1k lines** total — intentionally **thin** relative to **`src/state`**.

---

## 4. `src/domain` — Types, entities, shared constants

### Directory breadth

Entity modules (`account.ts`, `user.ts`, `donation.ts`, `transaction.ts`, `actionPages.ts`, integrations, storefront, ace products, etc.), **`constants/`** (countries, languages, parties, …), **`integrations/`** schemas and service maps.

**Scale:** **113** `.ts`/`.tsx` files, roughly **8.2k lines**.

---

## 5. `src/utils` — App-wide helpers

### Directory breadth

Small single-purpose folders: **`snakeToCamel`**, **`formatCash`**, **`getApiHostname`**, **`params`** / **`makeSearchParams`**, **`http/useGetOne`**, **`useGetPage`**, **`useGetInfinite`**, role checks (`isAdmin`, `isOwner`, `isSuperadmin`), **`useFormHistory`**, **`useTimezoneList`**, **`downloadCanvasAsPng`**, **`FeatureFlaggedComponent`**, **`usePlaid`**, etc.

**Scale:** **135** `.ts`/`.tsx` files, roughly **3.7k lines**.

---

## 6. `src/i18n` — Internationalization

### Structure

- **`index.ts`:** **`i18next`** + **`i18next-browser-languagedetector`** + chained backend **`i18next-resources-to-backend`** (lazy-loaded JSON), **`react-i18next`**, **`defaultNS: 'common'`**, custom **`titlecase`/`uppercase`** formatters.
- **`locales/en/*.json`** — many namespaces (admin, finance, action pages, integrations, …).
- **`locales/es/*.json`** — partial coverage (fewer namespaces than English).

**Scale:** **47** tracked files under `i18n`; JSON locale bundles sum to roughly **8.2k lines** (translations, not TS).

---

## 7. `src/pages/components` — Cross-page shells and admin-ish chrome

Examples: **`AuthenticatedWrapper`** (loads **`/me`** via **`ApiClient`**, hydrates **`useAuthStore`**, sets Axios CSRF defaults), **`RollbarWrapper`**, **`PageTitle`**, **`AccountSwitch`**, **`OrganizationList`** + filters/rows/cells, application/legal blocks, **`CreatePaymentMethodModal`**, **`RefundTransactionModal`**, **`VoidTransactionModal`**, **`CompleteSignupModal`**, **`ForceErrorPage`**, auth migration banner.

**Scale:** **61** `.ts`/`.tsx` files, roughly **3.1k lines**.

---

## Library / capability matrix (from `package.json` + imports)

| Capability | Libraries / location |
|------------|---------------------|
| **Rich text** | **`react-quill`** + **`quill`** / **`quill-delta`** (`ui` RTE); **`@tiptap/*`** (`Builder` text editor). |
| **Drag & drop** | **`react-beautiful-dnd`** (`Table` headers, `DragDrop`, some pages); **`@dnd-kit/*`** (Builder tickets, sortable lists, presets). |
| **Virtual lists** | **`react-window`**, **`react-window-infinite-loader`**, **`react-virtualized-auto-sizer`** (`InfiniteSelectControl`). |
| **Charts** | **`recharts`** (e.g. dashboard v2 charts); **`@visx/*`** (dashboard widgets: pie/line xy charts). Charts are **primarily page-level**, not a huge standalone `ui` chart kit. |
| **File upload** | **`react-dropzone`**, **`FileUploader`**, various form controls. |
| **Signature** | **`react-signature-canvas`**. |
| **Code editing** | **`@uiw/react-codemirror`**, **`@codemirror/lang-*`**, **`@codemirror/lint`**. |
| **Errors / observability** | **`@rollbar/react`**, **`rollbar`**, **`react-error-boundary`**, **`ForceErrorPage`**. |
| **Routing** | **`react-router-dom` v6** (app shell). |
| **Theming / UI kit** | **Chakra**, Emotion, **Tailwind**, Framer Motion. |
| **Canvas / diagrams** | **Konva** / **react-konva** (**`VenueEditor`**). |

**Not found as a standalone dependency:** dedicated **image cropping** npm (workflows use upload + attributes + galleries instead).

---

## Foundational footprint (order of magnitude)

| Area | TS/TSX files | Approx. LOC (TS) |
|------|--------------|------------------|
| `src/ui` | ~1,478 | ~66,000 |
| `src/state` | ~682 | ~26,000 |
| `src/domain` | ~113 | ~8,200 |
| `src/utils` | ~135 | ~3,700 |
| `src/service` | ~43 | ~1,100 |
| `src/pages/components` | ~61 | ~3,100 |
| `src/i18n` | JSON-heavy | ~8,200 lines JSON |

**Interpretation:** the **foundation** is dominated by **`src/ui` + `src/state`** (~90k LOC together): a large design-system-style layer (Chakra + Tailwind + many form/table/integrations molecules) backed by **Axios `ApiClient` + React Query + Zustand auth**, with **`src/domain`** as the shared type layer and **`src/service`** kept small.

[REDACTED]
